name: Lazarus Commander
description: An elite Lazarus Subject that retained higher cognitive function through the reanimation process — the result of prolonged Gray Wastes Aetherium exposure before death. It still wears officer's insignia. It still moves with tactical awareness. The crystals embedded in its skull form a crown-like growth that pulses with directed purpose. This is what Director Stone did not intend, and what she cannot stop.

phases.announce: The crystals in its skull flare white. It stops fighting like a soldier and starts fighting like something that has decided you will not leave.
Aetherium floods the dying tissue — a final, borrowed surge. The Commander straightens, wounds knitting, and comes on again.
